title: Salty Pillowy German English Muffins Toast
description: A nostalgic German-inspired dish featuring toasted English muffins topped with a savory mirepoix-based mixture, perfect for a quick breakfast or snack time.

ingredients.name: Mirepoix Mixture (Caramelized Onions, Bell Peppers, Carrots)

instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Toast the English muffins until lightly browned, about 2 minutes per side.
In a separate pan, caramelize the Mirepoix mixture over low heat for 10-12 minutes stirring occasionally.
Add the Salt and Black Pepper to the Mirepoix mixture and stir to combine.

Assemble the dish by spreading the Mirepoix mixture on top of the toasted English muffins, followed by a pat of Grass-Fed Butter, and finished with chopped Fresh Parsley and Diced Fresh Chives if using.
Repeat with any remaining ingredients if serving a crowd.
